current as a software development intern, am currently focusing on satellite communications and embedded systems. through my work, am gaining experience in programming with c and developing a range of related skills, including linux administration. am excited to be part of a dynamic and collaborative team, and am committed to developing my technical abilities and delivering high-quality work. tutor for high school children waitress hobbies and interests piano have been playing the piano since was a child and have received numerous diplomas from the royal academy of music, the last being the grade 6 diploma dance have been dancing most of my life, almost every kind of dance, from spanish dance to ballet, in which also got some diplomas from the royal academy of dance. the last one got was the grade 4 diploma. volunteering tutor for the adea project 2017-2018 volunteered for a year as a tutor at the cem (minor educational center) san cayetano, helping children with no resources. this project is carried out thanks to the foundation caritas madrid in the parish of virgen de la providencia y san cayetano. these children come from poor and dysfunctional families. it was a very rewarding experience to really help people in need.
